config.name: reconnecting_tubes_nu0001
config.description: Anti-parallel vortex tubes (sigma=0.3, strength=5, sep=1.2, perturb=0.35) at nu=0.0001. Previously ONLY tested at nu=0.01 (score=1.49). At nu=0.0001 Re=60000 → much faster reconnection and cascade. Crow instability triggers at perturb_amp=0.35 → min separation=0.5. Post-reconnection cascade should be intense. Expected timing: reconnection at t~1-2, cascade peaks ~t~4-6.
